name: WebRTC
summary: WebRTC session — HTTP signaling inbox (node) and DataChannel URI envelopes; browser P2P via ifURI /api/webrtc/signal.
description: WebRTC session — HTTP signaling inbox (node) and DataChannel URI envelopes; browser P2P via ifURI /api/webrtc/signal. A tellmesh capability pack adopted into urirun via its manifest (`urirun adopt-pack`): 4 webrtc:// routes mapped 1:1 to bindings.v2, validated, ready to project to MCP tools / A2A skills.
useCases: Address webrtc:// capabilities as URIs in a flow.
Project WebRTC operations to MCP tools / A2A skills.
Adopt the pack with one command, no code change.
requires: the tellmesh 'uriwebrtc' pack (GitHub) for real handlers; dispatch works simulated without it
